description: FOMC decision-day Reaction Map — measures the policy surprise (Δ2y market verdict + LLM statement tone) and maps it to per-asset short/long reaction ranges calibrated on JustHodl's own FOMC-day history; logs each call for forward self-grading. Output data/fomc-reaction.json + data/fomc-calibration.json.

schedule.description: FOMC reaction map daily 21:35 UTC (post-close; logs on decision days, refreshes calibration weekly)
